command: /bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,130p' elixir/lib/symphony_elixir/tracker.ex && sed -n '1,130p' elixir/lib/symphony_elixir/game_api/adapter.ex && sed -n '1,155p' elixir/lib/symphony_elixir/game_api/client.ex && grep -RIn --exclude-dir=_build --exclude-dir=deps 'issues/release\\|release.*claim\\|release_issue' elixir/test elixir/lib | head -200 && sed -n '90,145p' elixir/lib/symphony_elixir/orchestrator.ex && grep -RIn --exclude-dir=_build --exclude-dir=deps 'reconcile_blocked_issue_states_for_test\\|reconcile_missing_blocked' elixir/test | head -80"
